wins: Strong capital position with CET1 ratio of 11.3%
Growth in credit card portfolio with 13 consecutive quarters of growth
Improved credit performance in commercial real estate and industrial loans
Launch of new co-branded credit cards with Expedia and Volkswagen
risks: Commercial loan demand remains weak due to economic uncertainty
Office market remains weak with continued charge-offs in commercial real estate
Deposit pricing adjustments in response to Fed rate cuts
Uncertainty around economic conditions and election outcomes
Potential impact from outstanding litigation and regulatory matters
